name: pilot-core
description: Shared governance for full-stack Microsoft projects: stack detection and scaffolding, security audit/fix pipelines (/fsp-init, /fsp-audit, /fsp-fix, /fsp-learn), the autonomous delivery team (/fsp-architect assessment, /fsp-build one-shot spec-plan-implement-review-test pipeline with analyst/scout/architect/QA agents), MCP discovery, dependency supply-chain and license policy, CI secret scanning, REST API design standards, ADR discipline, and the cross-stack @fullstack-reviewer/@fullstack-implementor/@fullstack-support trio orchestrating specialists across Angular/.NET/SQL/Azure
